name: Elizabeth
oracleText:
Lifelink
When Elizabeth enters the battlefield, if you control a creature named John the Baptist, put a +1/+1 counter on that creature and draw a card.
Whenever another creature enters the battlefield under your control, you gain 1 life.
flavorText: "Whence is this to me, that the mother of my Lord should come to me?" — Luke 1:43
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mechanics, mana, colors, and stats added. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses James Tissot's "The Visitation" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: Mother of the Forerunner

classics.license: Public domain; Brooklyn Museum Commons upload marked with no known restrictions.
classics.sourceNotes: Elizabeth’s role is best served by the Visitation’s intimate two-figure composition.
